case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC VS. ERIC PAOLUCCI

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAOLUCCI, ERIC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE #291 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94110, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc. present. Represented by Leo Guzman.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Eric Paolucci is not present.
Attorney Laura Chiera representing the defendant through full scope.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of July-23-2012 remains on calendar. (D501)
